untranslatable_reason: Signal requires valuation metrics (P/E, P/B, Shiller CAPE) and structural market anomalies (margin debt, concentration ratios, derivative imbalances, institutional flows) which are NOT in the allowed indicator list. These are macro/fundamental indicators requiring external data sources, not price-action or technical indicators. The signal is a regime-detection framework rather than a tradeable entry/exit signal.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_2 is a regime-context rule for position sizing reduction, not a directional trading signal. It describes when to shift to cautious stance (80% exposure reduction) based on: (1) Valuation z-score >2.0 standard deviations above 20-year mean, and (2) 3+ structural anomalies present. Neither condition can be expressed with available price/technical indicators. Requires external data feeds for: valuation ratios, historical mean/std dev calculations, margin debt levels, sector concentration indices, options market imbalances, and institutional positioning data. Recommend: (a) Add custom indicators for these macro factors, or (b) Implement as a separate portfolio-level context filter outside the backtester.
